# thoth_fleet (Data Source)

Reads details for a single fleet by fleet_id.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fleet_id` (String) Fleet identifier.

### Read-Only

- `endpoint_count` (Number) Endpoint count for this fleet.
- `name` (String) Fleet display name.
- `region` (String) Fleet region.
- `response_json` (String) Full fleet response payload as JSON.
- `status` (String) Fleet status.
